title: Inventory to Hotbar
description: Remakes the hotbar in the style of the inventory
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Changes the style of the hotbar and related textures to the style of the creative inventory, including the color change when the slot is selected ![Before/After screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ba22b247aba6a0e048fd938b8ddd8165cc5da0.png) # | VERSIONS | Supports Minecraft Java ```1.20.2-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any resource pack editing the hotbar slots. Will not be consistent with any resource pack that changes the inventory style, such as dark UI packs ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
